displayName: NBD Pro — nightly Firestore backup stale > 26h

documentation.content:
The nightlyFirestoreBackup scheduled function hasn't emitted a success log line in more than 26 hours. The cron runs at 04:00 America/Chicago daily; missing two consecutive runs means restore capability may be compromised.

Investigation:
  1. `gcloud functions logs read nightlyFirestoreBackup --project nobigdeal-pro --limit 50`
  2. `gcloud scheduler jobs list --project nobigdeal-pro | grep nightlyFirestoreBackup`
  3. `./scripts/verify-backup.sh` to enumerate recent backup folders
  4. Confirm the function SA still has roles/datastore.importExportAdmin + roles/storage.objectAdmin on the backup bucket.
